name: audit-pack-emit json output uses sorted keys for canonical RFC 8785 JCS-style encoding per §2.24
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/audit-pack-emit.sh" --format json --commit-sha abc123 --generated-at 2026-05-25T00:00:00Z --out-dir out 2>err.txt && node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("out/abc123-2026-05-25T00:00:00Z/bundle.json","utf8"));const k=Object.keys(j);const s=k.slice().sort();process.exit(JSON.stringify(k)===JSON.stringify(s)?0:1)' && echo sorted 1>&2
